creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nuno Teixeira from comment #8)

> - :config-edit calls 'gvim' that I don't use. I will search for a way to use
> 'nvi'(base) if that possible

It seems that it only works with gui editors.
We don't have gvim, but I'm working on flavorize editors/neovim-qt and add qt6 to it.
